violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Store food items off floor in walk in freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers and freezer have a buildup of food debris and need cleaning. Pizza oven needs cleaning.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Use test strips on a regular basis to ensure proper chemical sanitizing concentrations are maintained at dish machine an dispensers. Acquire test strips for QUAT based sanitizer.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine not maintaining proper chemical sanitizing concentrations.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Soap dispenser at hand sink in main kitchen area not working.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Towels dispenser not working in main kitchen area and towels not provided at hand sink in bar area.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
